zh-CN.name: 字母S
zh-CN.intro: 字母S弯弯的，像一条小蛇。它经常出现在太阳、星星这些美好的词里，是个很特别的字母！

story.title: 🐍弯弯的字母S
story.body: 字母S长得弯弯绕绕，像一条可爱的小蛇。小蛇S最喜欢在阳光下扭来扭去。它说：“我的名字叫S，我能变出好多东西！”它变成太阳sun，照得小朋友暖洋洋；它变成星星star，一闪一闪亮晶晶；它变成大海sea，哗啦哗啦唱着歌。小朋友，我们一起找到更多的S吧！你看，滑梯是slide，蛇是snake，它们都有S的声音。小蛇S扭呀扭，带你认识大世界！

knowledge.title: 字母S是第几个字母？
knowledge.body: 字母S是字母表里的第19个字母，它的发音是/s/，像蛇发出的嘶嘶声。很多有趣的词都以S开头，比如太阳和星星。

en.name: Letter S
en.intro: Letter S is curvy, like a little snake. It often appears in nice words like sun and star. It’s a very special letter!

story.title: 🐍Curvy Letter S
story.body: Letter S is curvy and curly, just like a cute little snake. S the snake loves to wiggle in the sunshine. It says, “My name is S, and I can turn into many things!” It becomes the sun, warming the children; it becomes a star, twinkling bright; it becomes the sea, singing splashy songs. Kids, let’s find more S words! Look, slide is S, snake is S, they all have the S sound. The little snake S wiggles and shows you the big world!

knowledge.title: Which letter is S?
knowledge.body: Letter S is the 19th letter in the alphabet. It makes the sound /s/, like a snake hissing. Many fun words start with S, such as sun and star.
